panels.title: # of Errors (publish, poll, adapter, ZCL or route)
Link Quality from Prometheus MQTT Job
Query with Label State == On and Json parsed Label color_mode for testing

targets.expr: bottomk(5, avg by(device) (avg_over_time({device=~".+", service_name="zigbee2mqtt"} | unwrap linkquality [5m])))

panels.title: Errors Last 7 Days — All Devices by Type
Error Counts by Device & Type — Last 14 Days

targets.expr:
topk(5,
  sum by(device) (label_replace(count_over_time({service_name="zigbee2mqtt", type=~".*_error", type!="route_error"} [$__interval]),"device", "$1", "device", "(.+)"))
  or
  sum by(device) (label_replace(count_over_time({service_name="zigbee2mqtt", type="route_error"} [$__interval]),"device", "$1", "friendly_name", "(.+)"))
)

panels.title: Top 5 Devices by Error Count — Last 24 Hours

targets.expr:
sum by(device, type) (label_replace(count_over_time({service_name="zigbee2mqtt", type=~".*_error", type!="route_error"} [$__range]),"device", "$1", "device", "(.+)"))
or
sum by(device, type) (label_replace(count_over_time({service_name="zigbee2mqtt", type="route_error"} [$__range]),"device", "$1", "friendly_name", "(.+)"))

panels.title: Top 5 Devices — Error Breakdown — Last 24 Hours

options.content:
📡 {{device}}
{{date Time "MMM DD YYYY, HH:mm"}}
Build {{old_build}} → {{new_build}}
Date {{old_date}} → {{new_date}}

targets.expr: {service_name="zigbee2mqtt"} |= "was updated from" |= "softwareBuildID" | regexp `Device '(?P<device>[^']+)' was updated from '\{"dateCode":"(?P<old_date>[^"]+)","softwareBuildID":"(?P<old_build>[^"]+)"\}' to '\{"dateCode":"(?P<new_date>[^"]+)","softwareBuildID":"(?P<new_build>[^"]+)"\}'`
